result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Scrolled on Apple Watch Series 11 product page; a battery-life hero section is visible.
task_relevant_visible_text:
Apple Watch Series 11
Overview
Why Apple Watch
Tech Specs
Buy
Up to 13 hours of battery life. Always a positive.
selected_candidate:
13 hours of battery life
constraint_evidence:
- Navigate to Apple’s website: supported (apple.com page visible; title/url indicate Apple site)
- Latest Apple Watch model: supported (page title/url show Apple Watch Series 11)
- Determine average battery life: supported (battery life value visible)
- Exact battery-life figure visible on page: supported (“Up to 13 hours of battery life”)
- Need average vs max battery life: contradicted/unclear (visible text says “Up to 13 hours,” which is a maximum-style claim, not explicitly an average)
- Product detail page context: supported (product navigation and hero marketing section visible)
action_target:
Continue reading/scrolling for any battery-life details or footnote context that clarifies whether 13 hours is average or a specific usage estimate.
success_signals:
A battery-life spec or footnote explicitly stating average/typical battery life for Apple Watch Series 11.
failure_signals:
Only “Up to 13 hours” is shown with no average/typical qualifier; could be insufficient for the task’s “average” requirement.
uncertainty:
Whether Apple provides an average battery-life figure elsewhere on the page or in a footnote; current view only shows a maximum-style claim.

task_context.task: navigate: Navigate to Apple's website and determine the average battery life of the latest Apple Watch model.
task_context.title: Apple Watch Series 11 - Apple

args.query: Apple product page task asks for average battery life, but page only shows 'Up to 13 hours' maximum-style claim and run stops without clarifying average/typical battery life

items.summary: The agent exited before reaching a page state that satisfies the task.
items.fix_hint: Require a final evidence check that the requested information or state is visible before sending an exit message.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

args.query: battery life task on Apple product page only shows 'Up to 13 hours' and ends without clarifying average or typical battery life

args.expected_behavior: Continue until the page or a reliable Apple source explicitly states the average/typical battery life for the latest Apple Watch model, or otherwise verify that the displayed figure is indeed the requested average before exiting.
args.actual_behavior: The agent stopped on the Apple Watch Series 11 page after seeing only 'Up to 13 hours of battery life' and sent '[EXIT]' without resolving whether this figure is the requested average/typical battery life.
args.regression_rule: When the task asks for an average battery-life value, do not treat a maximum-style claim ('up to X hours') as sufficient; verify the exact qualifier or find a source that explicitly gives the average/typical battery life before terminating.

evidence.claim: The task requires determining the average battery life of the latest Apple Watch model.
The run reached the Apple Watch Series 11 product page on Apple, which is the latest Apple Watch model in this trajectory.
A high-detail inspection showed the visible battery-life text was 'Up to 13 hours of battery life. Always a positive.' and the VLM noted this is contradicted/unclear for an average requirement.
The agent ended the run with a send-message '[EXIT]' action without any further verification step.
The run contained many scrolls but no recorded step showing a specific average/typical battery-life figure.
Retrieved failure memory emphasizes verification before exiting and constraint checking for explicit user requirements.

suggested_followups.label: Find exact battery life
suggested_followups.message: Search Apple’s specs or footnotes for an explicit average/typical battery-life figure for Apple Watch Series 11.

suggested_followups.label: Compare watch models
suggested_followups.message: Check whether another Apple Watch model page exposes a clearer battery-life spec than Series 11.
